title: Continuous model calibration framework for smart-building digital twin: A generative model-based approach
review_note: [M] Full text frames calibration as aligning model output with real-time physical building measurements and measured/sensor data. [C] The proposed framework is explicitly a continuous model-calibration/model-updating method for building DTs. [O] The method is motivated by real-time physical measurements and continuous updating of the smart-building DT during operation.

title: From Mechanical Instability to Virtual Precision: Digital Twin Validation for Next-Generation MEMS-Based Eye-Tracking Systems
review_note: [M] Full text validates the MEMS eye-tracking DT by comparing a physical MEMS scanning system with its DT under static and dynamic conditions. [T] Dynamic tracking, vibration artifacts, image/signal metrics, and temporal behavior are central to the validation comparison.

title: DIGITAL TWIN VALIDATION FOR SHOULDER JOINT BIOMECHANICAL SIMULATION
review_note: [M] Full text states that the shoulder-joint FE simulations were validated with a laboratory load test on pork bones fitted with a reverse shoulder prosthesis, comparing force-displacement behavior with the physical test.

title: Population Balance Model Validation and Prediction of CQAs for Continuous Milling Processes: toward QbD in Pharmaceutical Drug Product Manufacturing
review_note: [M] Full text compares the population-balance milling model with additional unused experimental milling data. [C] Model parameters are estimated/calibrated using a subset of the experimental design data before validation on other processing conditions.

title: Finite element model updating for the dynamic response of continuous deck railway viaducts leading to efficient digital twins
review_note: [M] Full text compares measured viaduct accelerations from train passages with numerical DT predictions. [C] The FE DT is previously calibrated with operational modal-analysis experimental data. [O] The calibrated DT is embedded in a continuous predictive-maintenance prototype with alert thresholds. [T] Validation uses RMS and moving-window RMS acceleration responses/modal dynamic data.

title: Nonlinear finite element model updating and fourier neural operator for digital twin of reinforced concrete containment vessel under seismic excitations
review_note: [M] Full text updates and checks the RCCV model using shake-table measured acceleration/displacement data. [C] The nonlinear FE model updating framework recalibrates material/structural parameters to reduce response error. [T] Seismic acceleration inputs and response histories are used for validation. [S] The FNO digital-twin surrogate is trained and benchmarked against the FE/Abaqus simulation database and conventional FE solver results.

title: Automated model updating of digital twins using double-deep Q network with dueling architecture for damage detection
review_note: [M] Full text verifies the numerical steel-structure DT against experimental acceleration/modal data. [C] The method automates incremental model updating by changing element stiffness/damage parameters through reinforcement learning. [O] The paper targets autonomous real-time DT updates for rapid/online structural assessment. [S] Training and verification use a four-story numerical steel-structure environment with simulated damage episodes as the virtual testbed.

title: Toward Data Center Digital Twins via Knowledge-based Model Calibration and Reduction
review_note: [M] Full text validates calibrated data-center CFD models with production temperature-sensor measurements. [C] Kalibre iteratively calibrates CFD boundary/configuration parameters through surrogate-assisted parameter search. [O] The calibrated/reduced models are explicitly developed for online data-center operations and real-time temperature prediction. [S] Results are compared with manual-baseline calibration, search-based algorithms, neural-surrogate alternatives, and CFD/POD simulation outputs.

title: DESIGN OF EXPERIMENTS PLATFORM FOR ONLINE SIMULATION MODEL VALIDATION AND PARAMETER UPDATING WITHIN DIGITAL TWINNING
review_note: [C] Full text presents parameter updating/calibration so the virtual-replica simulation output matches validating data. [O] The method is an online simulation-model validation and parameter-updating platform within DT operation. [S] The demonstrated validation uses simulation/virtual-reference data rather than physical measurements, so measurement/experiment remains FALSE.

title: Towards a Digital Twin of a New Concrete Tied-Arch Bridge: Material Characterisation and Model Validation
review_note: [M] Full text validates the bridge DT using material characterisation, ambient-vibration testing, cable-frequency measurements, and strain measurements. [C] The FE bridge model is updated by implementing measured material properties and adjusting cable-frequency/stiffness parameters to reduce measured-computed differences.

title: Finite Element Model Updating of a Steel Cantilever Beam: Experimental Validation and Digital Twin Integration
review_note: [M] Full text compares cantilever-beam FEM predictions with experimentally measured modal data. [C] Mechanical properties are iteratively recalibrated in SAP2000 to reduce discrepancies with measured results. [T] Accelerometer signals, natural frequencies, mode shapes, and MAC/frequency comparisons provide the validation evidence.

title: Digital twin approach for on-load tap changers using data-driven dynamic model updating and optimization-based operating condition estimation
review_note: [M] Full text includes an experimental OLTC case using vibration signals from inactive and active power transformers. [C] The dynamic model is updated through optimization-based parameter tuning from observed vibration data. [T] Validation is based on vibration/time-frequency signal features and DRM-related temporal inflection behavior. [S] A numerical case compares the proposed method against simplified physics-based modelling and joint-input state-estimation baselines.

title: Digital Twin Validation with Multi-Epoch, Multi-Variate Output Data
review_note: [O] Full text formulates validation over multiple DT query epochs, where the simulator is initialized from recorded system state and checked repeatedly as epochs accumulate. [T] The validation data are multi-epoch, multivariate KPI trajectories/time-indexed outputs. [S] Empirical results use controlled simulation experiments to test whether simulator KPI distributions match system KPI distributions; no physical experiment is used, so measurement remains FALSE.

title: Digital twin-assisted gearbox dynamic model updating toward fault diagnosis
review_note: [M] Full text applies the gearbox DT updating method to an experimental physical gearbox study. [C] The virtual dynamic model is updated through physical-virtual signal similarity, sensitivity analysis, surrogate modelling, and optimization. [T] Validation depends on vibration/frequency signals and physical-virtual signal interaction.

title: Model Updating for Nonlinear Dynamic Digital Twins Using Data-Based Inverse Mapping Models
review_note: [C] Full text updates physically interpretable parameters of first-principles nonlinear dynamic models through an inverse mapping model. [O] The inverse model infers updated parameters in a near-real-time/online DT setting. [T] The updating features are extracted from measured/simulated time-series output samples. [S] The proof-of-principle uses simulated measured signals and simulated training data from a nonlinear multibody model, so physical measurement remains FALSE.

title: Enhancing structural damage evaluation of PC girder bridges through digital twinning Bayesian model updating
review_note: [M] Full text verifies PC-girder bridge DT predictions by comparison with measured experimental data including modal frequencies, crack/damage observations, and load-deflection behavior. [C] Bayesian model selection/updating calibrates FE-model parameters and uses the updated FE model for damage/residual-capacity evaluation.

title: Reusing Model Validation Methods for the Continuous Validation of Digital Twins of Cyber-Physical Systems
review_note: [C] Full text treats detected DT anomalies by correcting the DT through parameter estimation/calibration based on historical/runtime data. [O] The contribution is a continuous-validation workflow that compares real-world and simulated data at runtime, intermittently or continuously, for CPS digital twins. Physical measurement/experiment evidence is not an evaluated full-text case here, so measurement remains FALSE.

title: Real-time Validation of Digital Models for Manufacturing Systems: a Novel Signal-processing-based Approach
review_note: [O] Full text proposes online/real-time validation of manufacturing digital models in a Real-Time Simulation framework using data feeds from the real system. [T] The validation degree is based on signal-processing comparison of real and simulated KPI/input-output time-series signals, including spectral-density and batching steps. It does not perform parameter update, so calibration remains FALSE.

title: Online geometry assurance in individualized production by feedback control and model calibration of digital twins
review_note: [M] Full text compares simulated assembly quality/deviation with measured final production quality used as feedback in individualized production cases. [C] The sheet-metal assembly DT is calibrated through feedback control/state estimation and parameter identification using the quality discrepancy.

title: A modeling and adaptive evolution method for simulation parameters of digital twin shop floor
review_note: [M] Full text evaluates the digital-twin shop-floor parameter model with physical-shop-floor/order-operation data and comparative experiments on simulation accuracy. [C] SRVAE models/evolves DT simulation parameters and an online instructor updates the model to reduce parameter error. [O] The update uses online data and supports adaptive evolution of shop-floor DT parameters in real time.

title: Digital twin - based model updating method for mechanical behaviors analysis of cable truss structure
review_note: [M] Full text verifies the cable-truss DT by comparing static/dynamic mechanical-behavior predictions with measured test-structure data. [C] The method performs DT model updating through parameter correction/dynamic updating algorithms, then checks that the updated twin matches measured behavior.

title: How to Use and Derive Stylized Facts for Validating Simulation Models
review_note: [S] Full text is a generic simulation-model validation chapter. It discusses use and derivation of stylized facts for validating simulation models, including output, input, and theory validation, so it is classified as simulation/baseline comparison rather than physical measurement, calibration/update, online validation, or time-series validation.

title: A State-Synchronized Digital Twin-Driven Framework for Adaptive Optimization of Fourth-Party Logistics Networks in Off-Site Construction
review_note: [M] Full text reports empirical validation through a real-world Iranian steel-structure/off-site-construction logistics case with operational signals such as progress, GPS fleet status, production status, inventory, and site conditions. [C] State variables, parameters, and calibrated disruption thresholds are updated in the DT-driven simulation-optimization framework. [O] Operational signals are collected continuously and assimilated at rolling planning cycles for state-synchronized decisions.

title: Experiment-based calibration of a digital twin for composite panel testing using standard signals
review_note: [M] Full text creates and validates the composite-panel DT using experimental strain data and DIC-measured deflection fields from physical testing. [C] A measurement-centric calibration framework transforms the nominal FE model into a specimen-specific DT through nonlinear least-squares/model-updating calibration.

title: Experimental validation of the Ensemble Kalman Filter as a Laser Powder Bed Fusion digital twin
review_note: [M] Full text validates the LPBF DT/EnKF with thermal-camera and thermocouple measurements from a physical laser-powder-bed-fusion build. [C] The Ensemble Kalman Filter assimilates measured temperatures to correct/update thermal states. [O] The estimator is evaluated as an online DT estimation tool using real-time data streams. [T] Validation uses time-indexed temperature, laser-input, and error signals over build time.

title: Specifying Digital Twin Synchronization in Manufacturing Systems Using Stochastic and Timed Automata
review_note: [C] Full text specifies synchronization as periodic/event-triggered updating of the DT and physical/digital automata when deviations occur. [O] The synchronization process is explicitly for keeping a manufacturing DT continuously aligned with its physical twin during operation.

title: Behavioral trust management in Digital Twin systems using safe state analysis and virtual validation
review_note: [O] Full text models a closed-loop incubator DT in which the physical twin continuously sends temperature/state updates to the DT for trust-state evaluation. [S] Validation is simulation/virtual-validation based: the framework is tested in an incubator case study through simulation experiments and compared against alternative trust-update schemes. No physical measurement-output validation is reported, so measurement remains FALSE.

title: Smart Manufacturing Innovation Through the Integration of Digital Twin and IoT Energy Management
review_note: [O] Full text proposes a closed-loop DT-IoT energy-management framework where IoT sensor data are continuously synchronized with the DT engine for real-time monitoring and adaptive optimization. [S] Validation is conducted primarily through simulation, with simulation-based optimization and testbed-level feasibility checks rather than direct physical-output validation.

title: Automatic Calibration and Update of a Digital Twin for Plug & Produce
review_note: [M] Full text tests the plug-and-produce DT on a physical test bed using camera/asymmetric-circle-grid measurements of process-module locations and roughness-process accuracy requirements. [C] The DT automatically calibrates module locations and updates CAD/simulation-model placement when resources are added.

title: A multi-level multi-domain digital twin modeling method for industrial robots
review_note: [M] Full text verifies the industrial-robot DT with physical SD3/500 robot experiments, retrieving measured joint angles from the robot controller and comparing them with simulated DT angles. [T] The validation evidence is the time-varying trajectory of measured and simulated joint angles during pick-and-place operation.

title: A Credibility-Based Self-Evolution Algorithm for Equipment Digital Twins Based on Multi-Layer Deep Koopman Operator
review_note: [M] Full text evaluates the equipment DT on UAV flight data with measured motor speeds, inertial positions, Euler angles, and body rates. [C] When credibility declines, the self-evolution mechanism fine-tunes/updates the model. [O] Real-time data are integrated during operation to update the multi-layer Deep Koopman model. [T] The evidence uses high-frequency flight time-series and compares predicted trajectories with measured data.

title: Digital twin technique for automatic damage detection of historical buildings with an adaptive model updating approach
review_note: [M] Full text applies the historical-building DT to monitoring/test data for automatic damage detection. [C] The method uses adaptive model updating to align the DT with the monitored structure. [O] The paper distinguishes offline and online monitoring/update stages for maintaining the DT as new structural data arrive.

title: Preserving Dependencies in Partitioned Digital Twin Models for Enabling Modular Validation
review_note: [C] Full text extends modular validation so sub-models can be recalibrated, re-extracted, or kept intact when validation detects drift. [O] The method targets continuous validation of evolving manufacturing DT models. [T] Dependency preservation is based on event-log/token-flow sequences and activity-rate behavior in discrete-event manufacturing models. [S] The approach is evaluated through a manufacturing simulation case study rather than physical measurement comparison.

title: Development and Validation of Digital Twin Behavioural Model for Virtual Commissioning of Cyber-Physical System
review_note: [S] Full text validates the behavioural DT for virtual commissioning in a simulation/software-in-the-loop environment, checking PLC control code, motion trajectories, collisions, and interoperability before physical deployment. It does not report physical output matching, calibration, online DT maintenance, or signal/time-series validation.

title: Accurate EDM Calibration of a Digital Twin for a Seven-Axis Robotic EDM System and 3D Offline Cutting Path †
review_note: [M] Full text develops and validates a DT of a physical seven-axis robotic EDM system using robot/process measurements and physical-digital geometry. [C] The central method is EDM/robot calibration of the DT so offline cutting paths reflect the physical robotic system accurately.

title: Prediction of bearing remaining useful life based on a two-stage updated digital twin
review_note: [M] Full text validates bearing RUL prediction with experimental bearing degradation data. [C] The two-stage DT calibrates defect size and updates the full-life defect curve. [O] The method captures real-time interaction between real bearing and twin model. [T] Bi-LSTM maps vibration characteristics and degradation/time-sequence features to twin defect signatures.

title: Multi-stage calibration framework for a digital twin model in building operations: Cold chain logistics centers case study
review_note: [M] Full text calibrates and validates a cold-chain logistics-center building DT using measured sensor data from building operation. [C] A multi-stage calibration framework updates model parameters across stages. [T] The validation uses one-minute/transient temperature and energy-response time-series from the building operation case.

title: Research on full lifecycle health management of permanent magnet synchronous electric drum driven by digital twin with dynamic update
review_note: [M] Full text evaluates the permanent-magnet synchronous electric-drum DT with experimental/operational health-management data. [C] The method performs dynamic model update and online parameter optimization. [O] Full-lifecycle health management uses online monitoring/update cycles to keep the DT aligned with equipment state.

title: Real-Time Data Acquisition and Digital Twin Model Synchronization Technology of Wind-Solar Electrolysis Hydrogen Production System Based on Internet of Things
review_note: [M] Full text checks the wind-solar electrolysis hydrogen DT against physical operating/acquisition data from the IoT-enabled system. [C] DT model synchronization updates the model with acquired system data. [O] The contribution is real-time data acquisition and real-time model synchronization for the hydrogen-production DT.

title: Hierarchical Bayesian Model Updating of a 6 MW Offshore Wind Turbine Accounting for Variable Environmental and Operational Conditions
review_note: [M] Full text updates the 6 MW offshore wind-turbine model using measured operational/modal-response observations under varying environmental and operational conditions. [C] Hierarchical Bayesian model updating estimates/calibrates FE-model parameters from those observations.

title: DIGITAL TWIN CALIBRATION FOR BIOLOGICAL SYSTEM-OF-SYSTEMS: CELL CULTURE MANUFACTURING PROCESS
review_note: [M] Full text calibrates the biological system-of-systems DT with experimental cell-culture manufacturing data. [C] DT calibration adjusts model parameters/policies to fit observed cell-culture behavior. [O] The method is framed for sequential DT calibration/decision updates during process operation. [T] Evidence uses cell-culture time-course/process trajectory data. [S] The calibration policy is compared with random/GP or simulation-policy baselines in the reported experiments.

title: Thermal Model Validation of a Power Electronics Module for Digital Twin Application
review_note: [M] Full text validates the power-electronics thermal DT by comparing theoretical/simulation thermal behavior with experimental thermal measurements on the module. It is a validation study, not a model-calibration/update workflow.

title: An MBSE approach for Virtual Verification & Validation of Systems with Digital Twins
review_note: [S] Full text proposes MBSE-based virtual verification and validation of DT-enabled systems in a virtual/simulation setting. It does not provide physical measurement comparison, model calibration, online validation, or time-series signal evidence.

title: Digital twin with augmented state extended Kalman filters for forecasting electric power consumption of industrial production systems
review_note: [M] Full text trains/validates the electric-power-consumption DT with measured industrial voltage, current, and power data. [C] The augmented-state EKF estimates hidden states/parameters to correct the DT forecast. [T] Validation is based on time-aligned electrical power/voltage/current prediction curves.

title: Cognitive digital twin in manufacturing process: integrating the knowledge graph for enhanced human-centric Industry 5.0
review_note: [M] Full text evaluates the cognitive manufacturing DT with real production-line/human-machine process data in a manufacturing case. [C] The knowledge graph and DT model are dynamically updated/evolved from mapped real-time data. [O] Real-time manufacturing data are mapped into the intelligent knowledge layer for ongoing state understanding and model evolution.

title: Integrating digital twins in metal sink factories: A pathway to smart manufacturing
review_note: [M] Full text validates the metal-sink-factory DT by comparing simulated production/station-rate behavior with real factory production data. No model-calibration/update, online validation cycle, signal/time-series method, or simulation-baseline comparison is used as validation evidence.

title: Methods to Enable Evolvable Digital Twins for Flexible Automated Production Systems
review_note: [M] Full text demonstrates evolvable DT methods on flexible automated production-system experiments/operation data. [C] The evolvable-DT workflow updates/reconfigures model elements and parameters as the automated production system changes.

title: Robust Online Update of Digital Twin for Flexible Automation Cell
review_note: [M] Full text tests the flexible-automation-cell DT update with physical 3D-scan/vision data and location-accuracy checks. [C] The method updates the DT model geometry/resource locations from scan/object-recognition evidence. [O] The paper is explicitly a robust online update method for keeping the flexible automation-cell DT current after changes.

title: Digital Twin of Cyber-Physical CNC for Smart Manufacturing
review_note: [M] Full text evaluates the cyber-physical CNC DT by comparing real CNC process/machine data with the DT representation. [T] The comparison uses dynamic CNC process traces/signals rather than only static output values.

title: Towards discrete manufacturing workshop-oriented digital twin model: Modeling, verification and evolution
review_note: [M] Full text validates the discrete-manufacturing workshop DT by comparing physical workshop data with virtual model outputs. [C] The DT model evolves/updates across geometry, behavior, rule, and data dimensions. [O] Physical workshop data support synchronous model evolution during operation. [T] Verification includes spatial-temporal workshop data and process/event timing information.

title: Updating digital twins: Methodology for data accuracy quality control using machine learning techniques
review_note: [M] Full text uses historical plant/process data to evaluate data-accuracy quality control for DT updates. [C] The methodology detects and predicts data/model-update errors so DT updating can be accepted or corrected.

title: A modelling and updating approach of digital twin based on surrogate model to rapidly evaluate product performance
review_note: [M] Full text verifies the surrogate-based DT updating method with experiments on a bogie suspension system. [C] The improved LHS-Adam update algorithm adaptively updates model structure/parameters when operating state changes are perceived.

title: IIoT-Supported Manufacturing-Material-Flow Tracking in a DES-Based Digital-Twin Environment
review_note: [M] Full text uses IIoT/PLC/IMU manufacturing-material-flow data from the physical system to check the DES-based DT. [C] The DES model is synchronized/updated from detected material-flow events. [O] The DT environment tracks material flow during operation with live IIoT support. [T] Validation evidence includes physical/digital event timing and sequence traces.

title: Methodology for enabling dynamic digital twins and virtual model evolution in industrial robotics - a predictive maintenance application
review_note: [M] Full text tests and validates the virtual-model-evolution module on an industrial robotic manipulator/manufacturing application using collected field data. [C] The method tunes physics-based model parameters and automatically propagates updated values to the digital model.

title: Self-learning Time-varying Digital Twin System for Intelligent Monitoring of Automatic Production Line
review_note: [M] Full text validates the automatic-production-line DT with actual machining/production quality and process-monitoring data. [C] The self-learning DT updates tool-wear/process models from observed data. [O] The system is designed for intelligent monitoring and self-learning update of a time-varying production-line DT during operation.

title: Live fitting of process data within digital twins of manufacturing to use simulation and optimisation
review_note: [M] Full text applies fitting/live fitting to real production-system processing-time and scrap-rate data. [C] Probability-distribution parameters are estimated and updated from process data for the simulation model. [O] Live fitting is an online/real-time one-pass update procedure over incoming manufacturing data streams. [T] The method detects timely changes/change points in process-data streams over time.

title: Online validation of digital twins for manufacturing systems
review_note: [O] Full text proposes online validation of manufacturing DTs during operation. [T] The validation method compares real and simulated manufacturing sequences using time-series/sequence similarity measures such as LCSS and dynamic time warping. [S] The method is demonstrated through numerical DES/manufacturing simulation experiments rather than physical measurement validation.

title: The ontology-based modeling and evolution of digital twin for assembly workshop
review_note: [C] Full text proposes ontology-based modeling and evolution so the assembly-workshop DT updates model/state knowledge as workshop resources and processes change. [O] The DT evolution relies on real-time shop-floor/RFID/sensor data to keep the assembly-workshop representation current. The paper mainly demonstrates modeling/evolution feasibility rather than physical validation metrics.

title: Online Validation of Simulation-Based Digital Twins Exploiting Time Series Analysis
review_note: [O] Full text presents online validation of simulation-based manufacturing DTs. [T] It exploits time-series analysis/sequence similarity for comparing DT and reference behavior. [S] Evaluation is based on simulation/numerical manufacturing experiments, not direct physical-system measurement comparison.

title: Verification and validation of digital twins and virtual testbeds
review_note: [M] Full text states that DT/virtual-testbed validity is assessed by comparing simulated and real measured data from equivalent reference experiments. [S] The paper is explicitly about simulation-based V&V for digital twins and virtual testbeds, including virtual experiments and simulation-model verification/validation.

title: Multidimensional data modeling and model validation for digital twin workshop
review_note: [M] Full text validates a digital-twin workshop model by comparing physical and virtual workshop data in an aerospace machining case. [T] Validation uses multidimensional spatial-temporal data, including process timing/sequence information, rather than only aggregate outputs.

title: Model updating of a wind turbine blade finite element Timoshenko beam model with invertible neural networks
review_note: [C] Full text performs wind-turbine blade FE model updating with invertible neural networks and checks updated modal-response parameters. [S] Validation is by resimulation of the updated model against target modal responses, with no physical experiment used in the evaluated case.

title: Incremental update of a digital twin of a production system by using scan and object recognition
review_note: Full text is about incrementally refreshing the geometry/content of a production-system DT using scan and object recognition. It does not provide full-text evidence for measurement-based validation, calibration/update checking against outputs, online validation, time-series/signal comparison, or simulation/baseline validation, so all classification columns remain FALSE.

title: Artificial Neural Network for Fast and Versatile Model Parameter Adjustment utilizing PAT Signals of Chromatography Processes for Process Control under Production Conditions
review_note: [M] Full text uses inline Process Analytical Technology measurement data/noisy online concentration measurements for chromatography-process model adjustment. [C] Model parameters are updated/adjusted from PAT data to match the current operation state. [T] PAT chromatogram/concentration signals provide the evidence used for parameter adjustment.

title: A concept in synchronization of virtual production system with real factory based on anchor-point method
review_note: [C] Full text presents the anchor-point method to detect variances between cross-domain mechatronic data structures and synchronize/update the virtual production-system model with the real factory across the lifecycle. It does not report a physical-output validation experiment, online validation metric, time-series comparison, or simulation baseline.

title: Digital Twin for Legacy Systems: Simulation Model Testing and Validation
review_note: [S] Full text validates/testing a legacy-system DT through simulation-model testing, virtual commissioning, and control-code/model checks. It does not ground validation in physical measurement comparison, calibration/update, online validation, or signal/time-series evidence.

title: Digital Twin Bionics: A Biological Evolution-Based Digital Twin Approach for Rapid Product Development
review_note: [C] Full text describes biological-evolution-style DT co-evolution where product/production twins iterate, update, and evolve across lifecycle stages. [O] The DT bionics framework emphasizes continuous virtual-physical interaction and real-time synchronization/commissioning-style iteration. It is mainly conceptual/case-based rather than direct physical measurement validation.

title: A Complete Digital Chain to Enable the Digital Twin of a Shop Floor
review_note: [M] Full text reports a shop-floor DT digital chain using data directly captured from the shop floor and factory sensors/MES supervision. [C] Statistical/input models are continuously updated from real-world feedback and process calibration data. [O] The core requirement is real-time synchronization of the real shop floor with the underlying model.

title: Digital twin based computerized numerical control machine tool virtual prototype design
review_note: [C] Full text gives a CNC virtual-prototype DT update strategy in which model/performance data are updated from real-time mapping between physical and digital spaces. [S] The method is evaluated as virtual prototyping/cosimulation for CNC machine-tool behavior, replacing physical experiments with virtual simulations.

title: Change-point visualization and variation analysis in a simple production line: A process mining application in manufacturing
review_note: [T] Full text analyzes production-line event logs with timestamps to visualize change points and variation over time. [S] Simulation is used to test the procedure in a realistic medium-size production-line model; no physical DT validation or model update is performed in the reported evaluation.
